name: LLM Endpoint - Valid User Message
description: Validates the /rfq/llm endpoint returns a professional LLM response for a valid user_message.
input: POST /rfq/llm with JSON body {"user_message": "What is the status of my RFQ?"}
output: JSON response with success: true and llm_response containing a string.
error_scenarios: user_message missing or not a string
